name: On Tap
description_short: On Tap Grille & Bar is a casual restaurant and bar chain operating three Ohio locations since 1982, serving hand-breaded appetizers, wings, burgers, and sandwiches with full bar service.
description_long:
On Tap Grille & Bar was founded in 1982 when a cousin and two brothers opened the original neighborhood bar and grille in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio. The concept began modestly with a few sandwiches, appetizers, and three draft beers. Over four decades, the Michaels family has expanded the business to three locations: the original Cuyahoga Falls location (remodeled in 2018), Medina (opened 1988, relocated 2014), and Stow (opened 2005).

On Tap offers a menu of hand-breaded appetizers, chicken dishes, burgers, sandwiches, and gyros, with their wings being a signature item. They emphasize fresh, homemade food at competitive prices. Each location features a fully stocked bar with dozens of domestic and imported beers on draft and bottle. The Medina location operates Sunday-Wednesday 11am-9pm and Thursday-Saturday 11am-10pm, with daily happy hours from 11am-4pm featuring $3.75 domestic pints and $6.75 liters.

The company distinguishes itself through multiple revenue streams including on-site dining, online food ordering, catering/party bookings, gift cards, and a waitlist system for table management. Each location offers entertainment options including live entertainment, karaoke, and outdoor patios. The Medina and Montrose locations feature heated, enclosed patios with TVs. The business has maintained family ownership and employee relationships as core values for over 30 years.

On Tap Grille & Bar is fundamentally a casual dining restaurant and bar operator, not a financial services company. It was incorrectly categorized as a "payday-alternative" lender. This is a straightforward hospitality business focused on food, beverages, and entertainment services across three Ohio markets. The company has no connection to consumer finance, lending, credit services, or financial products of any kind.
services: Full-service bar with draft and bottled beer selection
Happy hour specials and daily promotions
Outdoor patio seating (some heated and enclosed)
pros: Three established locations with 40+ year track record since 1982
Hand-breaded, homemade food preparation emphasized for freshness
Competitive happy hour pricing: $3.75 domestic pints and $1 off craft pints during specified times
Multiple entertainment options including live music, karaoke, and outdoor heated patios
Online ordering, gift cards, and party booking services available
Weekly specials including Monday wing buffet ($14.99 per person)
Full bar with dozens of domestic and imported draft and bottled beers
cons: Limited to three Ohio locations; no statewide or national presence
No delivery service mentioned; customers must visit in-person or use limited online ordering
Standard restaurant pricing without indication of value compared to competitors
Website shows no upcoming events at Medina location
No online menu pricing visible on website for price comparison
best_for: Local Ohio residents seeking casual dining with full bar service
Groups planning private parties or events in Medina, Cuyahoga Falls, or Stow
Customers looking for daily happy hour specials and wing buffets
diagnosis: On Tap Grille & Bar is a casual dining restaurant and bar operator, not a financial services company. The categorization as a "payday-alternative" lender is completely incorrect. This business should be recategorized to hospitality/restaurant services, as it has no connection whatsoever to consumer lending, credit products, or financial services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
